steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: An opening parenthesis after “stockade” marks a parenthetical phrase defining what a stockade is. This structure parallels (a halter) for “hackamore”.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content: Parentheses must be paired; a closing parenthesis is the only choice that matches the opening mark. The dash, comma, and semicolon cannot close an opening parenthesis. That matches choice D — D is correct.
